violations.text: The following was observed: 1) The counter top/ledges at the bar observed in poor repair. The counter top/ledges observed chipped and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. 2) The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026

Pasta was observed held at 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The following was observed: 1) The counter top/ledges at the bar observed in poor repair. The counter top/ledges observed chipped and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. 2) The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. An asterisk needs to be added to the consumer advisory. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Some droppings observed in the basement area. Establishment shall get an evaluation from PCS. PCS report shall be provided to inspector before re-inspection date. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The counter top/ledges at the bar observed in poor repair. The counter top/ledges observed chipped and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The menu is missing an allergen statement for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was moved to the 3-bay sink to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Meatballs and chicken cutlets were observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, foods were kept in reach-in cooler overnight. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Poached chicken was observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. All foods prepped on-site must be used or disposed of within 7 days. Person in charge voluntarily disposed of food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Burger sliders are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

Utensils are stored on an unclean surface (hanging on wall observed with food debris) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the cooking equipment has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The food prep sink was observed with an air-break. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The floors in the kitchen were observed to be cracked/lifting 2) The bar ledge was observed to be chipping New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026

The floors in dry storage room and the shelving in the alcohol closet in the liquor room were observed with old rodent droppings. The areas must be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/23/2026
